absorption: Significant BID absorption is occurring around the 62200-62240 level; high negative delta (-350, -262) is failing to push the price lower, indicating trapped sellers.
dom_observation: Bids are holding firm around 62230 despite aggressive market selling, indicating passive buyers are absorbing the downward pressure.
reasoning: Aggressive sellers are being absorbed at a local support level, creating a high-probability trapped seller scenario for a bullish reversal.
